title: Preserve current logo appearance unchanged

requirements.text: Keep the KopdeGoa logo exactly as it currently appears in the Header, Hero, and Footer components — do not alter its size, styling, transparency, positioning, or any other visual properties.
acceptanceCriteria: The logo in the Header component renders identically to the current approved state.
The logo in the Hero component renders identically to the current approved state.
The logo in the Footer component renders identically to the current approved state.
No changes are made to logo size, opacity, padding, margin, background, or wrapper elements.

constraints: Do not modify any logo-related styles, classes, or wrapper elements in Header.tsx, Hero.tsx, or Footer.tsx.
Do not replace or alter the logo image asset.
nonGoals: Changing any other visual or functional aspect of the site.
